policy.catalogOwnership: Every reachable static string belongs to the shared locale catalog or to an explicitly declared fallback row.
policy.queryPersistence: Locale switching, root redirect, and refresh preserve the route query and selected view.
policy.authenticationBoundary: This localization artifact records the existing access context but never grants or expands anonymous access. Anonymous SPA access is limited by the runtime policy to the login and account-recovery flow; all other configured and unmatched routes require an authenticated session.

proofPolicy.assertionSemantics: Stable route IDs require a live route scenario plus every target-declared semantic scenario. Focused component tests remain digest-bound state proof; planned assertion prose alone is never execution evidence and cannot activate a locale.

routeFamilies.trigger: Open an authenticated data-section root and resolve its exact configured model-list child.

targetCoverage.ownership: route configuration and destination-page locale catalog
targetCoverage.structureAudit: exact configured-path closure and redirect ownership

plannedBrowserAssertions: each authenticated data-section root resolves to its exact model-list child and localized scope/title

routeFamilies.trigger: Open the anonymous user root and resolve the exact login-flow child.

targetCoverage.ownership: route configuration and login-page locale catalog
targetCoverage.structureAudit: exact redirect target and anonymous login boundary

plannedBrowserAssertions: the anonymous /user root resolves only to the localized /user/login boundary
